overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring Aloy fighting robotic machines in a snowy mountain environment. The clip begins with combat against two distinct machines, then transitions to exploration as the character ascends mountain trails, passes through a narrow icy gorge, and enters a dense snow-covered forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain clearing with combat debris

events.description: Aloy engages the first machine with melee spear attacks
The black crab-like machine explodes and collapses into wreckage

agents.ego_description: Aloy fights a large black machine with red glowing components using melee attacks with purple energy effects

notable_agents.action: Large black crab-like machine with red glowing parts lunges at Aloy and attacks with melee strikes

entered.detail: White snow covering the mountain floor with footprints and combat scorch marks
Snow-dusted rock formation on the left side of the clearing
Snow-dusted rock formation on the right side
Cluster of snow-covered evergreen trees on the left slope
Cluster of snow-covered evergreen trees on the right slope

segments.scene_description: Aloy engages in combat with a large black crab-like machine in a snowy mountain clearing surrounded by rocky outcrops and pine trees. The machine attacks with glowing red components, and after a brief exchange of melee strikes, it explodes and collapses into smoking wreckage on the snow.

events.description: Aloy engages the second machine, a tall bipedal unit with orange lights
The tall machine explodes after being hit with energy projectiles

agents.ego_description: Aloy uses ranged energy attacks to fight a tall bipedal machine, dodging and firing blue energy projectiles

notable_agents.action: Tall bipedal machine with orange glowing lights and weapon arms firing projectiles at Aloy

entered.detail: Distant snow-capped mountain peak visible in the background
Large boulder formation on the right side of the slope

segments.scene_description: Aloy moves to a new area of the mountain slope to engage a second machine, this one tall and bipedal with orange glowing components. She uses ranged energy attacks while dodging, eventually destroying the machine in a fiery explosion that leaves salvageable wreckage on the snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain trail between rocky outcrops

events.description: Aloy sheathes weapon and transitions from running to walking uphill
Light snowfall becomes visible as Aloy ascends higher elevation

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks steadily up the winding mountain trail, weapon sheathed, navigating snow-covered rocks

entered.detail: Winding path through the snow leading upward between rock formations
Snow-covered mountain range visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: After the combat encounters, Aloy sheathes her weapon and begins ascending a winding mountain trail. The path cuts through snow-covered terrain flanked by rocky cliffs and scattered pine trees, with distant mountain peaks visible ahead as light snow begins to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky gorge with hanging icicles

events.description: Trail narrows into enclosed rocky passage with vertical walls
Large icicles become visible hanging from the rock walls overhead

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks carefully through the narrow rocky gorge, passing beneath icicles and rock overhangs

entered.detail: Vertical rock wall forming the left side of the narrow gorge
Vertical rock wall forming the right side of the passage
Long icicles hanging from the rock overhangs above the trail

segments.scene_description: The open mountain trail transitions into a narrow enclosed gorge with steep rock walls rising on both sides. Aloy walks through this sheltered passage where large icicles hang from the overhangs above, partially blocking the sky and creating a more confined environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail with dense pine canopy

events.description: Exiting the narrow passage into a dense snow-covered forest

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks along a path through dense snowy woods with tall pine trees lining both sides

entered.detail: Narrow path winding through the dense forest with snow-covered ground
Snow-covered fallen tree trunk lying beside the path

segments.scene_description: Aloy exits the narrow rocky passage and enters a dense snowy forest where tall pine trees line both sides of the trail. The snow-laden branches create a semi-covered canopy overhead as she continues walking along the winding forest path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain clearing as a series of intense robotic battles unfold. It begins with Aloy engaging a large black crab-like machine amidst rocky outcrops and pine trees, culminating in the creature exploding into smoking wreckage on the snow. As the camera tracks her movement across the mountain slope, the focus shifts toward a second encounter with a tall, bipedal machine featuring glowing orange components. The scene then transitions from melee combat to a sequence of ranged energy attacks and agile dodging before the second machine is destroyed in a fiery explosion. Finally, the camera lingers on the remaining salvageable wreckage scattered across the frozen terrain.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from an open mountain trail through a restrictive rocky gorge and into a dense snowy forest. It begins with Aloy sheathing her weapon and climbing a winding path flanked by rocky cliffs and scattered pines under a light snowfall. As the trail narrows, the scene shifts into a confined gorge where steep rock walls rise on both sides and large icicles hang from the overhangs. The camera then follows her as she exits the sheltered passage, with the environment expanding into a thick forest of tall pine trees. Finally, the path winds deeper into the woods beneath a semi-covered canopy of snow-laden branches.
